{{Infobox madra
| name = vital aura
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

''See also: [[vital aura Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Vital aura]] is the fundamental energy of the natural world, serving as a pervasive force that permeates the atmosphere and environment. It is described as having no beginning or end, existing as a unified whole that takes on various specific aspects such as fire, water, wind, earth, light, dreams, death, blood, and destruction. While it is a singular entity, these different aspects can be identified by their distinct colors and sensations when viewed through [[spiritual sight]]. In the context of [[sacred arts]], vital [[aura]] is the primary source of power for practitioners. Once an individual reaches the [[Copper stage]], their spirit opens, allowing them to harvest and cycle this environmental energy into their own [[madra]]. This process is essential for advancement and strengthening one's body and spirit. The density and balance of [[aura]] in a specific location can influence the formation of natural spirits, such as [[Sylvan]] [[Riverseeds]], and can significantly impact the speed and safety of a practitioner's progression. Furthermore, vital [[aura]] can be utilized to power magical constructs or manipulated through resonance to enhance weapons and techniques. Beyond sentient beings, vital [[aura]] accumulates in plants and animals over long periods, potentially allowing them to develop rudimentary spirits or reach higher levels of existence.}}

== Unsouled ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Vital aura]] is absorbed by animals and plants to facilitate advancement.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c2">''Unsouled'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Soulsmith ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Copper stage]] allows the ability to cycle [[vital aura]] from heaven and earth.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c2">''Soulsmith'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|Sacred beasts refine [[vital aura]] into [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c4">''Soulsmith'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The mining mechanism draws in [[vital aura]] from the region.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c14">''Soulsmith'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Vital aura]] can be sensed by [[Copper]] senses.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c17">''Soulsmith'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Blackflame ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The cloudship must fly lower when the [[vital aura]] runs low.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c5">''Blackflame'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Vital aura]] can generate [[sword aura]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c13">''Blackflame'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Soulfire]] is woven from condensed [[vital aura]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c18">''Blackflame'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Skysworn ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Vital aura]] makes [[Cradle]] larger than average for an inhabited planet and affects how humanity spreads.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c18">''Skysworn'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Ghostwater ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Vital aura]] can still like a held breath.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c7">''Ghostwater'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Underlord ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Eithan]] watches the [[vital aura]] in the air.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c6">''Underlord'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Vital aura]] is described as having no beginning and no end.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c9">''Underlord'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] has a connection to the [[vital aura]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c15">''Underlord'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Uncrowned ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Lands with strong [[vital aura]] can experience [[aura]]-storms.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c8">''Uncrowned'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Wintersteel ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Min Shuei]] can freeze [[vital aura]] with her will.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7">''Wintersteel'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Bloodline ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Akura Fury]]'s technique involves something deeper than [[vital aura]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c3">''Bloodline'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[vital aura]] was muted and washed out near the [[Titan]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c6">''Bloodline'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Skepticism could be seen in the [[vital aura]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c21">''Bloodline'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Tension in the air can be sensed as a vibration in the [[vital aura]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c4">''Reaper'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Vital aura]] is a chaotic power that spins like a churning sea.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c8">''Reaper'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Vital aura]] can be focused over hundreds of miles.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c30">''Waybound'', chapter 30</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Reigan Shen]] reaches out to a buzzing [[vital aura]] during his transformation.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Tiberian]] can Rule the [[vital aura]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Cycling [[vital aura]] is more difficult than normal meditation.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c10">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Lindon]] felt the [[vital aura]] in [[Cradle]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c13">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Madra]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
[[Category:Terminology]]
